raw_response: {"detections":[{"biasType":"Bias by Omission","biasedText":"Polling analyst Patrick Allocco told Newsmax on Monday that despite wide disparities in early surveys on U.S. airstrikes against Iran, he sees little evidence of Republican voters breaking with President Donald Trump.","explanation":"The piece relies solely on one analyst’s perspective and offers no countervailing viewpoints from other pollsters, parties, or experts, omitting information that could challenge or contextualize his interpretation."},{"biasType":"Unsubstantiated claims","biasedText":"GET TODAY NEWSMAX+: NEWSMAX is the fastest-growing cable news channel in America with more than 30 million people watching!","explanation":"Asserts superlatives and audience size as facts without providing verifiable evidence, time frame, or metrics."},{"biasType":"Opinion Statements Presented as Fact","biasedText":"You need to watch NEWSMAX today.","explanation":"An imperative opinion framed as a necessity, presented in the outlet’s own voice rather than attributed as opinion."},{"biasType":"Subjective Qualifying Adjectives","biasedText":"Get it with great shows from Rob Schmitt, Greta Van Susteren, Greg Kelly, Carl Higbie, Rob Finnerty – and many more!","explanation":"Uses subjective praise (“great”) and promotional hype to positively frame the outlet’s programming in non-news language."}]}

detections.biasedText: Polling analyst Patrick Allocco told Newsmax on Monday that despite wide disparities in early surveys on U.S. airstrikes against Iran, he sees little evidence of Republican voters breaking with President Donald Trump.
detections.explanation: The piece relies solely on one analyst’s perspective and offers no countervailing viewpoints from other pollsters, parties, or experts, omitting information that could challenge or contextualize his interpretation.

detections.biasedText: GET TODAY NEWSMAX+: NEWSMAX is the fastest-growing cable news channel in America with more than 30 million people watching!
detections.explanation: Asserts superlatives and audience size as facts without providing verifiable evidence, time frame, or metrics.

detections.biasedText: You need to watch NEWSMAX today.
detections.explanation: An imperative opinion framed as a necessity, presented in the outlet’s own voice rather than attributed as opinion.

detections.biasedText: Get it with great shows from Rob Schmitt, Greta Van Susteren, Greg Kelly, Carl Higbie, Rob Finnerty – and many more!
detections.explanation: Uses subjective praise (“great”) and promotional hype to positively frame the outlet’s programming in non-news language.
